LAW AND MOTION 302, SAKTI INTERNATIONAL CORPORATION'S MOTION TO EXPUNGE NOTICE OF LIS PENDENS. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: GRANTED. PLAINTIFF AGREED NOT TO FILE A LIS PENDENS. ADDITIONALLY, PLAINTIFF HAS NOT SHOWN THAT ITS CLAIMS ARE PROBABLY VALID. PLAINTIFF HAS NOT SHOWN THAT IT PERFORMED OR THERE ARE GROUNDS TO EXCUSE ITS PERFORMANCE AND THAT DEFENDANT MATERIALLY BREACHED THE AGREEMENT. DEFENDANT'S ORAL REQUEST FOR ATTORNEY FEES WAS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, REPORTER: LAVENA WARD, CSR #7077

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-06-2012 Off Calendar

Sakti International Corporation'S Motion To Expunge Notice Of Lis Pendens
Off Calendar Jun-08-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: SAKTI INTERNATIONAL CORPORATION'S MOTION TO EXPUNGE NOTICE OF LIS PENDENS.
Appearances: Shaudy Danaye-Elmi of Arnold & Porter LLP (677.6522) for defendant and moving party; Ali Pash Hamidi of Cox Castle Nicholson (392.4200) for plaintiff and responding party.
Argued and the court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Granted. Plaintiff agreed not to file a Lis Pendens. Additionally, Plaintiff has not shown that its claims are probably valid. Plaintiff has not shown that it performed or there are grounds to excuse its performance and that Defendant materially breached the Agreement. Defendant's oral request for attorney fees was denied without prejudice. Order signed. (302/HEK) Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Expunge Notice Of Lis Pendens
Off Calendar Jun-08-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT SAKTI INTERNATIONAL CORPORATION, A CALIFORNIA'S MOTION TO EXPUNGE NOTICE OF LIS PENDENS WILL BE HEARD AT 9:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 302 ON LINE 16 OF THE LAW AND MOTION CALENDAR.

Notice Of Motoin To Compel Arbitratoin And Stay Action Pending Such Arbitration; Memo P/A; Declarations
Off Calendar May-30-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. ALI PASHA HAMIDI OF COX CASTLE NICHOLSON, TEL. NO. 392-4200 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. SHAUDY DANAYE-ELMI OF ARNOLD & PORTER LLP, TEL. NO. 471-3110 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - THE MATTER WAS NOT ARGUED. THE COURT VACATED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULED AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF LEONINE CAPITAL LLC'S Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Action Pending Such Arbitration IS TAKEN OFF-CALENDAR DUE TO THE PARTIES STIPULATION. ORDER ON STIPULATION WAS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported. = (302/HEK)
